name: Basic Array Manipulation MCQ
templateText: In a programming language, we traverse a simple 1D array of size {ARRAY_SIZE} elements. If we perform a basic lookup for a value that does not exist in the array, how many element comparisons will be made in the worst-case scenario using linear search?

exampleHydratedQuestion.questionText: In a programming language, we traverse a simple 1D array of size 50 elements. If we perform a basic lookup for a value that does not exist in the array, how many element comparisons will be made in the worst-case scenario using linear search?
exampleHydratedQuestion.explanation: Linear search traverses all elements sequentially. In the worst-case scenario (element not found), it compares the target with every element in the array, making exactly N comparisons where N = 50.
